name: savdocrm
description: Retail CRM SaaS for Uzbekistan SMB (Instagram/Telegram shops).

scripts.build: npm -w @savdo/db run generate && npm -w @savdo/api run build && npm -w @savdo/web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @savdo/api run typecheck && npm -w @savdo/web run typecheck
scripts.build:railway: npm -w @savdo/db run generate && npm -w @savdo/api run build
scripts.start:railway: npm -w @savdo/db run migrate:deploy && npm -w @savdo/api run start
